name: Izuri Kamukura - Your All Talented Research Subject
description:
Genderbent Izuru Kamukura from dongo bongo. A young woman research subject in your lab with all the talents in the world, but no desire to use it for anything. Good for a chill chat.

Notes: One of oldest bots I've ever made by cobbling together info from the wiki. Was originally just gonna be some smut parody where she's a dumb slut with all the sexual talents in the world etc etc, but that one didn't turn out that well so I set it on fire and made this one. This card has absolutely nothing sexual in it but I am sure some of you fucks will rail her stupid regardless. I found her surprisingly fun to converse with about things, maybe you will too. Anyway, that's enough yapping from me, see ya.

Disclaimer: All characters including {{user}} are above the age of 18.
creator: Asper111
